title: clusia tabulamontana
intro: Clusia tabulamontana, also known as the "Maya Nut," is a tropical plant native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clusia tabulamontana include reducing inflammation, improving heart health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to take advantage of its various health benefits.
